name: Cream of Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook and stir onions and celery in butter until onions are tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in water, half-and-half, cheese spread, instant bouillon, and nutmeg.
4. Heat to boiling over medium heat, stirring constantly; stir in wine.
5. Heat to boiling. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
6. Sprinkle each serving with paprika and garnish with croutons.
